name: AlphaX POS Manager PIN

fields.label: Manager User
fields.description: The Frappe user who owns this PIN. Must have the AlphaX POS Manager or System Manager role to be useful.

fields.label: Active
fields.description: Uncheck to disable this PIN without deleting the record. Useful when an employee leaves but you want to retain audit history.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes (e.g. 'Khalid, Riyadh region', 'reset Apr 26 after vacation'). Not shown to the manager themselves.

fields.label: PIN
fields.description: The PIN itself is hashed and never visible. Use the 'Set/Reset PIN' action from the form to issue a new PIN.

fields.label: PIN Hash
fields.description: Bcrypt hash of the manager's PIN. Never stored or transmitted in plaintext.

fields.label: Lockout State
fields.description: Updated automatically by the verify endpoint. Cleared on a successful PIN entry.

fields.label: Failed Attempts (current window)
fields.description: Counts toward the next lockout. Resets to 0 on a successful PIN entry, or after a long pause.

fields.label: Lockouts Today
fields.description: How many times this PIN has hit a 5-fail lockout today. Drives the exponential backoff schedule. Resets at midnight.

fields.label: Locked Until
fields.description: If set and in the future, the PIN cannot be verified.

description: A 4-6 digit PIN that authorizes a manager to perform privileged actions at a cashier station (bind/change/reset terminal). Each manager has at most one PIN. PINs are bcrypt-hashed and never stored or transmitted in plaintext after they are set. Lockout policy is exponential backoff after 5 wrong attempts (5min, 30min, 4hr, 24hr+admin alert, then admin-reset only).
